title: hieracium angustatum subsp. ovulatum
intro: Hieracium angustatum subsp. ovulatum, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Hieracium angustatum subsp. ovulatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestive health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions or teas, and it is often used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
